briefdescription.para: Error table data structure version.
Error table data structure LC version.
ERROUTS version.
ERROUTS LC version.
PCIE0 link down proc Id.
PCIE1 link down proc Id.
This function handles the error in LPD SLCR routed to PLM.

parameterdescription.para: is the node ID for the error event
is the register mask of the error received

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for Errors in LPDSLCR.

parameterdescription.para: is the node ID for the error event
is the register mask of the error received

briefdescription.para: This function handles the PCIE errors.

parameterdescription.para: is the node ID for the error event
is the register mask of the error received

briefdescription.para: This function handles the CPM_NCR PCIE link down error.

detaileddescription.para: This function handles the PCIE link down error.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIE0/1 IR status register address
is the DMA0/1 CSR INT DEC register address
is the ProcId for PCIE0/1 link down error
is the PCIE0/1 Device IR status register address
is the PCIE0/1 General status register address
is the ProcId for PCIE0/1 link down error
is the PCIE0/1 IR status register address.
is the DMA0/1 CSR INT DEC register address.
is the ProcId for PCIE0/1 link down error.

briefdescription.para: This function handles the XPPU errors.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XPPU
is string prefix to be used while printing event info

briefdescription.para: This function handles the XMPU errors.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XMPU
is string prefix to be used while printing event info

briefdescription.para: This function provides error table pointer.
This function reconfigures error actions after the update.
This function provides event index.

parameterdescription.para: is the Node Type of the EAM register
is the Node Type of the EAM register.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for Error action "Print to Log".

detaileddescription.para: This function prints detailed information if the error is due to XMPU/XPPU protection units.

ErrorNodeId
is the node ID for the error event
RegMask
is the register mask of the error received
This function prints detailed information if the error is due to XMPU/XPPU protection units.

ErrorNodeId
is the node ID for the error event
RegMask
is the register mask of the error received
None
This function prints detailed information if the error is due to XMPU/XPPU protection units.

parameterdescription.para: is the node ID for the error event.
is the register mask of the error received.

inbodydescription.para: Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information
Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information
Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information
Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information
Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information

briefdescription.para: This function dumps EAM Error status registers and Gic Status registers.
This function restricts error actions.

parameterdescription.para: of Error
of Error
of the the Error

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: of Error
of Error
of the the Error
of Error.
of Error.
of the the Error.

inbodydescription.para:
For HBM Cattrip, only support actions are:
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_INVALID
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_POR
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_SRST
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_CUSTOM
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_ERROUT

For HBM Cattrip, only support actions are:
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_INVALID
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_POR
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_SRST
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_CUSTOM
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_ERROUT

For HBM Cattrip, only support actions are:
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_INVALID
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_POR
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_SRST
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_CUSTOM
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_ERROUT

briefdescription.para: This function provides pointer to NumErrOuts.
This function enables the error action for the given error mask.

parameterdescription.para: is the error action mask register address
is the register mask of the error to be disabled

listitem.para: XPLMI_ERROR_ACTION_NOT_ENABLED if error action is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the LPD SCLR error actions for the given mask.

parameterdescription.para: is the offset for the PMC ERR, POR ,IRQ mask,SRST mask
is the register mask of the error to be disabled

listitem.para: XPLMI_ERROR_ACTION_NOT_DISABLED if error action is not disabled.
Check if the error action is disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the EAM errors.

parameterdescription.para: is presently passed as NULL

listitem.para: Interrupt is selected as response for Custom, subsystem shutdown and subsystem restart actions. For these actions, error will be disabled. Agent should clear the source and enable the error again using SetAction. In SetAction, error will be cleared and enabled. For subsystem cases, during subsystem restart, error will be enabled again.
Clear and enable EAM errors at IOMODULE level

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the error actions in LPD Slcr Disables all the LPD SLCR error actions and registers default action.

listitem.para: Set the default actions as defined in the Error table.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the error action as prescribed by the command.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are * Error Node ID * Error Action 0 - Invalid 1 - POR 2 - SRST 3 - Custom(Not supported) 4 - ErrOut 5 - Subsystem Shutdown 6 - Subsystem Restart 7 - Print to log 8 - SLD 9 - SLD with TRI 10 - None * Error ID Mask

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XPLMI_CANNOT_CHANGE_ACTION if failed to change error action.
XPLMI_LPD_UNINITIALIZED if LPD failed to initialize.
